title: Better Together
lesson: Working together as a team gets the job done and is much more fun.

gists: On a sunny sandy beach, the child kneels alone building a sandcastle, determined, with a bucket and spade beside them.
On the beach, the child kneels alone, frustrated and disappointed, as part of the sandcastle wall crumbles with sand scattered and the bucket tipped.
On the beach, the child (far left) kneels by the sandcastle, hopeful, while two friends, a boy and a girl, walk up at right offering to help.
On the beach, the child (far left) pats sand onto a growing sandcastle, focused and happy, while the boy carries a bucket of water and the girl digs sand at right — working as a team.
On the beach, the child (far left) kneels beside a tall finished sandcastle with towers and a little flag, proud, while the two friends at right clap and point happily.
On the beach in golden light, the child (far left) stands with arms raised in celebration beside the grand sandcastle while the two friends at right cheer — better together.
texts: On the sunny beach you worked hard, building a sandcastle all by yourself.
But the wall crumbled down! You frowned. It was tricky to do all alone.
Just then two friends came over. "Can we help?" they asked. "Yes, please!" you said.
Together you patted sand, carried water and dug. Working as a team, the castle grew tall!
At last your sandcastle stood proud, with towers and a little flag. "We made it!" you cheered.
You threw your arms up high and celebrated together. Better together — teamwork is much more fun!
